subcategory: glassmorphism trust hero with marquee logos
use_cases: SaaS landing pages showcasing product value propositions with animated trust indicators
Company homepages building credibility through client logos and key statistics
Product launch pages with social proof elements and call-to-action buttons
Fintech or tech company hero sections featuring brand credibility and animated metrics
ai_summary: A premium glassmorphism hero section featuring a dark zinc background with animated client logo marquee, interactive statistics with hover lift effects, and dual CTA buttons. The component uses entrance animations with staggered delays for visual polish, making it ideal for SaaS and fintech landing pages requiring social proof and trust building elements.
